description: Add a domain object to an event: misp-add-domain-object
examples:
Command Example
!misp-search category="External analysis" type="url"
Context Example
{
"MISP.Event": [
{
"EventCreatorEmail": "admin@admin.test",
"SharingGroupID": "0",
name: misp-search

outputs.description: MISP event ID. MISP.Event.Distribution MISP event distribution.
outputs.name: MISP.Event.ID

outputs.description: Threat level of the MISP event (1 High, 2 Medium, 3 Low, 4 Undefined). MISP.Event.PublishTimestamp Timestamp of the publish time (if published).
outputs.name: MISP.Event.ThreatLevelID

outputs.description: Email address of the event creator. MISP.Event.Date date
outputs.name: MISP.Event.EventCreatorEmail

outputs.description: MISP.Event.Locked Is the event locked. MISP.Event.OwnerOrganisation.ID
outputs.name: Event creation date.

outputs.description: Owner organization ID. MISP.Event.OwnerOrganisation.Name Owner organization name.
outputs.name: number

outputs.description: Owner organization UUID. MISP.Event.RelatedEvent.ID Event IDs of related events (can be a list).
outputs.name: MISP.Event.OwnerOrganisation.UUID

outputs.description: If email lock was proposed. MISP.Event.Timestamp Timestamp of the event.
outputs.name: MISP.Event.ProposalEmailLock

outputs.description: Event's galaxy description. MISP.Event.Galaxy.Name Galaxy name.
outputs.name: MISP.Event.Galaxy.Description

outputs.description: Galaxy type. MISP.Event.Published Whether the event is published.
outputs.name: MISP.Event.Galaxy.Type

outputs.description: Whether correlation is disabled. MISP.Event.UUID Event UUID.
outputs.name: MISP.Event.DisableCorrelation

outputs.description: Event shadow attributes. MISP.Event.Attribute.Distribution Attribute distribution.
outputs.name: MISP.Event.ShadowAttribute

outputs.description: Attribute value. MISP.Event.Attribute.EventID Attribute event ID.
outputs.name: MISP.Event.Attribute.Value

outputs.description: Attribute timestamp. MISP.Event.Attribute.Deleted Whether the attribute is deleted.
outputs.name: MISP.Event.Attribute.Timestamp

outputs.description: Whether attribute correlation is disabled. MISP.Event.Attribute.Type Attribute type.
outputs.name: MISP.Event.Attribute.DisableCorrelation

outputs.description: Attribute ID. MISP.Event.Attribute.UUID Attribute UUID.
outputs.name: MISP.Event.Attribute.ID

outputs.description: Attribute shadow attribute. MISP.Event.Attribute.ToIDs Whether the Intrusion Detection System flag is set.
outputs.name: MISP.Event.Attribute.ShadowAttribute

outputs.description: Attribute category. MISP.Event.Attribute.SharingGroupID Attribute sharing group ID.
outputs.name: MISP.Event.Attribute.Category

outputs.description: Attribute comment. MISP.Event.Analysis Event analysis (0 Initial, 1 Ongoing, 2 Completed).
outputs.name: MISP.Event.Attribute.Comment

outputs.description: Event sharing group ID. MISP.Event.Tag.Name All tag names in the event.
outputs.name: MISP.Event.SharingGroupID

outputs.description: Object meta category. MISP.Event.Object.Distribution Distribution of object.
outputs.name: MISP.Event.Object.MetaCategory

outputs.description: Name of the object. MISP.Event.Object.TemplateVersion Template version of the object.
outputs.name: MISP.Event.Object.Name

outputs.description: ID of the event which the object first created. MISP.Event.Object.TemplateUUID UUID of the template
outputs.name: MISP.Event.Object.EventID

outputs.description: Timestamp of object creation MISP.Event.Object.Deleted Whether the object was deleted.
outputs.name: MISP.Event.Object.Timestamp

outputs.description: ID of object. MISP.Event.Object.UUID UUID of the object.
outputs.name: MISP.Event.Object.ID

outputs.description: Value of attribute. MISP.Event.Object.Attribute.EventID ID of first event that originated from the object.
outputs.name: MISP.Event.Object.Attribute.Value

outputs.description: Date Timestamp of object creation. MISP.Event.Object.Attribute.Deleted
outputs.name: MISP.Event.Object.Attribute.Timestamp

outputs.description: Whether the object was deleted. MISP.Event.Object.Attribute.ObjectID ID of the object.
outputs.name: Boolean

outputs.description: Whether correlation is disabled. MISP.Event.Object.Attribute.ID ID of the attribute.
outputs.name: MISP.Event.Object.Attribute.DisableCorrelation

outputs.description: Relation of the object. MISP.Event.Object.Attribute.Type Type of object.
outputs.name: MISP.Event.Object.Attribute.ObjectRelation

outputs.description: UUID of the attribute. MISP.Event.Object.Attribute.ToIDs Whether the to_ids flag is on.
outputs.name: MISP.Event.Object.Attribute.UUID

outputs.description: Category of the attribute. MISP.Event.Object.Attribute.SharingGroupID ID of the sharing group.
outputs.name: MISP.Event.Object.Attribute.Category

outputs.description: Comment of the attribute. MISP.Event.Object.Description Description of the object.
outputs.name: MISP.Event.Object.Attribute.Comment
